name: libssh
reason: Cargo metadata reports the Rust crates, not the full native libssh source tree. Keep THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md and release artifacts aligned.
source: vendored through libssh-rs/libssh-rs-sys when the Cargo feature `vendored` is enabled

name: OpenSSL
reason: OpenSSL LICENSE and NOTICE handling must be checked before binary releases.
source: vendored through openssl-src when `vendored-openssl` is enabled
